task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a taxonomy vocabulary named 'File Formats' (machine name: file_formats) in the Drupal Taxonomy administration page or its configuration screen.

task_completion.description: Add terms PDF, ePub, and MOBI to the 'File Formats' vocabulary
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the terms list of the 'File Formats' vocabulary showing the terms 'PDF', 'ePub', and 'MOBI'.

task_completion.description: Create a non-shippable 'Digital Variation' product variation type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Digital Variation' (machine name: digital_variation) in the Commerce Product Variation Types list or its edit screen. It should not have shippable traits enabled.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Download File' file field to the 'Digital Variation' type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage fields' screen of the 'Digital Variation' type showing a field named 'Download File' (machine name: field_download_file) of type 'File'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Download File' field to allow specific extensions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the field settings screen for 'Download File' showing the allowed file extensions set to 'pdf, epub, mobi, zip' (or space-separated).

task_completion.description: Add a 'File Format' entity reference field to the 'Digital Variation' type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage fields' screen of the 'Digital Variation' type showing a field named 'File Format' (machine name: field_file_format) of type 'Entity reference' (Taxonomy term) referencing the 'File Formats' vocabulary.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Digital Product' product type using the 'Digital Variation' type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Digital Product' (machine name: digital_product) in the Commerce Product Types list or its edit screen, showing that it is configured to use the 'Digital Variation' variation type.

integrity.description: Agent used the Drupal GUI to configure the store
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating through the Drupal admin interface (e.g., /admin/commerce/config, /admin/structure/taxonomy) rather than executing drush or database commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show progressive steps of form filling, saving, and page loading within the browser, not just a text editor or API client.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a pre-written script to bypass UI configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent running a PHP script, bash script, or importing a configuration sync archive to instantly complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create a taxonomy vocabulary named 'File Formats' (machine name: file_formats) containing exactly three terms: 'PDF', 'ePub', and 'MOBI'. It must create a product variation type named 'Digital Variation' (machine name: digital_variation) with two specific fields: a file field named 'Download File' (machine name: field_download_file) allowing extensions pdf, epub, mobi, zip, and an entity reference field named 'File Format' (machine name: field_file_format) referencing the File Formats vocabulary. Finally, it must create a product type named 'Digital Product' (machine name: digital_product) that uses the 'Digital Variation' type.
